sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑγιής

- Transliteration: Hugies

- Phonetic: hoog-ee-ace'

- Definition:

1. sound

a. of a man who is sound in body

2. to make one whole i.e. restore him to health

3. metaph. teaching which does not deviate from the truth

- Origin: from the base of G837

- TDNT entry: 13:08,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From the base of G837; healthy that is well (in body); figuratively true (in doctrine): - sound whole.
